item.title: DTCC processes first live tokenized U.S. stock, ETF and Treasury trades with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and 40 partner firms
Japan's parliament approves bill reclassifying crypto as financial instruments and cutting the top tax rate from 55% to 20%
CLARITY Act faces make-or-break Senate floor vote before August recess; House holds New York field hearing July 17
SEC adds three crypto rulemaking proposals covering token offerings, broker-dealer custody and exchange market structure
MiCA transition closed July 1; under 210 of 1,200-plus EU crypto-asset service providers hold full CASP authorization
U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs drew $181M in net inflows Tuesday; Ether ETFs added $58M as softer CPI data boosted market sentiment
California Digital Financial Assets Law took effect July 1, requiring a state license for crypto firms serving California residents
JPMorgan to accept bitcoin and ether as collateral for institutional client lending
DeFi protocols lost $35M across three exploits in the week of July 5-11, including a $9M breach at Hedera lender Bonzo Lend
Chainalysis attributes 76% of global crypto hack losses in 2026 to Lazarus Group-linked state actors
DeFi sector lost more than $840M to hacks across 50-plus incidents in H1 2026, a 70% year-on-year increase
Japan's FIEA crypto reform paves the way for regulators to accept spot bitcoin ETF applications
